title: apw-rs Feature Registry
description: Machine-readable source of truth for what is being ported from each upstream project, into which apw-* crate, in which milestone, and at what status. FEATURES.md is generated FROM this file; this file is never generated. The four tool crates (feature-guardian, feature-md, feature-harvester, feature-graph) read and write this file.

schema_version.description: Semver of this registry schema. Bump on breaking changes to the Feature shape.

registry_revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number for the registry content. Bumped on every commit that adds/removes/changes a feature. Used by feature-md to detect when FEATURES.md is stale.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last registry update. Updated by maintainers, not tools.

sources.description: Upstream repos catalogued in the registry. Drives feature-harvester and provides provenance.

role.description: Why this source is being ported.

id.description: Stable feature identifier, e.g. '3.1.6'. Format: section.subsection.sequence. Re-numbering breaks diff readability, so never renumber.

phase.description: phase-1 = Visual Office Foundation + Living Office Simulation (current build, M0-M5). phase-2 = Economy & Multi-Role Roadmap (post-office).

milestone.description: Milestone this feature lands in. M6+ is for forward-looking work with no committed milestone yet.

status.description: done = feature exists in apw-rs. porting = actively in progress for a milestone. planned = on the roadmap for a milestone but not started. deferred = recognized but explicitly out of scope. not-adopted = exists upstream but apw-rs has decided not to take it.

source_id.description: Foreign key to sources[].id. Required unless source == 'apw-rs' (cross-cutting).

from.description: Where the feature comes from upstream.

path.description: File path in the upstream repo, e.g. 'kernel/event-core.mjs'.

kind.description: file = a single source file. module = a directory of files. endpoint = a URL/route. block = a paragraph/section in a file. section = a top-level section in a doc.

url.description: Deep link to the upstream file, e.g. on GitHub.

to.description: Where the feature lands in apw-rs.

crate.description: Crate name, e.g. 'apw-kernel'. Must match a workspace member or be a documented future crate.

path.description: Path in the apw-rs tree, e.g. 'crates/apw-kernel/src/event_core.rs'.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and searching, e.g. ['kernel', 'replay', 'trust'].

depends_on.description: Feature IDs this feature depends on. Drives the dependency graph and the critical-path computation.

rationale.description: Why this feature is in this phase and at this status.

notes.description: Free-form notes. Use for forward-compat placeholders, known limitations, design references.
